issues.message: Inconsistent verbs are used to create secondary objects. Sinks use 'create-sink' whereas schedules use 'add-schedule' (should be 'create-schedule').
Inconsistent verbs are used to delete secondary objects. Sinks use 'delete-sink' whereas schedules use 'remove-schedule' (should be 'delete-schedule').
Listing commands ('sinks', 'schedules') output JSON formatting by default instead of a tabular structure.
Table column headers printed by 'todo list' are not rendered in bold.
Command options do not support the '--no-headers' flag.
Daemon status and stop commands use 'failed' error messages instead of 'cannot'.
The command 'todo list' uses a non-standard '--filter-state' flag, whereas other query commands consistently use direct property filtering flags (e.g., '--kind', '--status', '--target').
Exact time is formatted using a custom Go layout rather than ISO 8601 when '--rfc3339' is absent.
